title: Health Institutions Management Mission and Vision
content:
Health Institutions Management Mission and Vision

Mission:

To cultivate healthcare professionals who create and apply evidence-based knowledge to enhance the health of individuals and communities.

Vision:

The program’s vision is for its graduates to provide leadership and improve healthcare throughout Turkey.
